query: You are working on the ankidroid/Anki-Android repository. The codebase is at version 2.186 (commit: d6dd8b51). ## Issue to Resolve [BUG]: Can't display images with `#` in filenames ### Checked for duplicates? - [X] This issue is not a duplicate ### What are the steps to reproduce this bug? 1. Add a card including an image file containing `#` (hashtag) in its filename --- --- --- --- 3. Show the card in reviewer or previewer ### Expected behaviour The image is shown, as on 2.16.5. (2.16.5) ### Actual behaviour The broken-image icon is shown, and the image isn't shown. ### Debug info ```text AnkiDroid Version = 2.17.6 (568538896be943818ca793dd2635822265712def) Backend Version = 0.1.34-anki23.12.1 (23.12.1 1a1d4d5419c6b57ef3baf99c9d2d9cf85d36ae0a) Android Version = 11 (SDK 30) ProductFlavor = play Manufacturer = OPPO Model = CPH2013 Hardware = qcom Webview User Agent = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 11; CPH2013 Build/RKQ1.200903.002; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/122.0.6261.119 Mobile Safari/537.36 ACRA UUID = df169a4d-29ec-46b6-b114-141ca7e01ba3 Crash Reports Enabled = true ``` ### (Optional) Anything else you want to share? - Originally reported in Anki Forum: https://forums.ankiweb.net/t/ankiweb-and-ankidroid-do-not-display-images-containing-pound-hashtag-sharp-symbol/42444/1 and dae has commented there. - As reported there, this issue occurs on AnkiWeb, too. ![image](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/10436072/c588f585-b23c-4be6-b8f1-8a098a127705) So, strictly speaking, this is not a bug specific to AnkiDroid, but some approach specific to AnkiDroid may be needed, I'm not sure though. - This issue doesn't occur on Anki Desktop (as reported in Anki Forum) and on AnkiMobile. - The `#` is shown as `%23` on the editor of Anki Desktop (as reported in Anki Forum). ![image](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/10436072/5ba75763-6007-4668-b036-0cb13e54cdc5) > \> Windows changes it back to a # in the sort field, but the HTML text remains unchanged > > This happens because Anki stores filenames without encoding on disk (legacy reasons), but needs to encode them before they’re shown in the editor. (dae) ### Research - [X] I am reporting a bug specific to AnkiDroid (Android app) - [X] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue - [X] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting)) (2.18alpha6) ## Additional Context from Issue Discussion It seems to have already been fixed in the current HEAD. I don't think so, it is ongoing discussion in the PR, https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/pull/15909#issuecomment-2001940011 Thank you for the feedback. Not for objection (since I don't have enough knowledge about the topic), just for rewording more accurately and for what it is worth, the issue seems to have been fixed in my debug version build from a854e93 (Mar 17, 2024). On the other hand, a card with the image file added in Anki Desktop is not shown properly (i.e. shown as a broken-image icon) even in the debug version of AnkiDroid. In this case, `#` is shown as it is in the editor and the browser. “#” is a illegal char in HTML, so it’s not supposed to work anywhere if not encoded. Ankidroid encodes it when importing, and AFAIK Anki does it as well. > Ankidroid encodes it when importing In case that users import cards that contain image files with unencoded `#`, for example, importing the following shared deck, why images with `#` in filenames are shown in reviewer on 2.16.5, but not on 2.17.6? - https://ankiweb.net/shared/info/789434294 --- Read now damien's comment about "legacy reasons". Since `#` still isn't supposed to be treated as something else that isn't a URL fragment marker in that context, this is a deliberate anki breakage of the URL scheme. I hate breaking things deliberately without a unavoidable reason, but I'll send the fix ## Relevant Files The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue: - `.idea/dictionaries/davidallison.xml` - `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/TemplateManager.kt` ## Instructions Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above. Focus on: - Understanding the root cause of the issue - Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem - Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality ## Important Evaluation Notes **Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing. **If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files ## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS **NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

  53→/**
  54→ * Supported URIs:
  55→ *
  56→ * * .../notes (search for notes)
  57→ * * .../notes/# (direct access to note)
  58→ * * .../notes/#/cards (access cards of note)
  59→ * * .../notes/#/cards/# (access specific card of note)
  60→ * * .../models (search for models)
  61→ * * .../models/# (direct access to model). String id 'current' can be used in place of # for the current model
  62→ * * .../models/#/fields (access to field definitions of a model)
  63→ * * .../models/#/templates (access to card templates of a model)
  64→ * * .../schedule (access the study schedule)
  65→ * * .../decks (access the deck list)
  66→ * * .../decks/# (access the specified deck)
  67→ * * .../selected_deck (access the currently selected deck)
  68→ * * .../media (add media files to anki collection.media)
  69→ *
  70→ * Note that unlike Android's contact providers:
  71→ *
  72→ *  * it's not possible to access cards of more than one note at a time
  73→ *  * it's not possible to access cards of a note without providing the note's ID
  74→ *
  75→ */
  76→class CardContentProvider : ContentProvider() {
  77→
  78→    companion object {
  79→        /* URI types */
  80→        private const val NOTES = 1000
  81→        private const val NOTES_ID = 1001
  82→        private const val NOTES_ID_CARDS = 1003
  83→        private const val NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD = 1004
  84→        private const val NOTES_V2 = 1005
  85→        private const val MODELS = 2000
  86→        private const val MODELS_ID = 2001
  87→        private const val MODELS_ID_EMPTY_CARDS = 2002
  88→        private const val MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES = 2003
  89→        private const val MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID = 2004
  90→        private const val MODELS_ID_FIELDS = 2005
  91→        private const val SCHEDULE = 3000
  92→        private const val DECKS = 4000
  93→        private const val DECK_SELECTED = 4001
  94→        private const val DECKS_ID = 4002
  95→        private const val MEDIA = 5000
  96→        private val sUriMatcher = UriMatcher(UriMatcher.NO_MATCH)
  97→
  98→        /**
  99→         * The names of the columns returned by this content provider differ slightly from the names
 100→         * given of the database columns. This list is used to convert the column names used in a
 101→         * projection by the user into DB column names.
 102→         *
 103→         *
 104→         * This is currently only "_id" (projection) vs. "id" (Anki DB). But should probably be
 105→         * applied to more columns. "MID", "USN", "MOD" are not really user friendly.
 106→         */
 107→        private val sDefaultNoteProjectionDBAccess = FlashCardsContract.Note.DEFAULT_PROJECTION.clone()
 108→        private const val COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG = "AnkiDroid database inaccessible. Open AnkiDroid to see what's wrong."
 109→
 110→        private fun sanitizeNoteProjection(projection: Array<String>?): Array<String> {
 111→            if (projection == null || projection.isEmpty()) {
 112→                return sDefaultNoteProjectionDBAccess
 113→            }
 114→            val sanitized = ArrayList<String>(projection.size)
 115→            for (column in projection) {
 116→                val idx = FlashCardsContract.Note.DEFAULT_PROJECTION.indexOf(column)
 117→                if (idx >= 0) {
 118→                    sanitized.add(sDefaultNoteProjectionDBAccess[idx])
 119→                } else {
 120→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Unknown column $column")
 121→                }
 122→            }
 123→            return sanitized.toTypedArray()
 124→        }
 125→
 126→        init {
 127→            fun addUri(path: String, code: Int) = sUriMatcher.addURI(FlashCardsContract.AUTHORITY, path, code)
 128→            // Here you can see all the URIs at a glance
 129→            addUri("notes", NOTES)
 130→            addUri("notes_v2", NOTES_V2)
 131→            addUri("notes/#", NOTES_ID)
 132→            addUri("notes/#/cards", NOTES_ID_CARDS)
 133→            addUri("notes/#/cards/#", NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD)
 134→            addUri("models", MODELS)
 135→            addUri("models/*", MODELS_ID) // the model ID can also be "current"
 136→            addUri("models/*/empty_cards", MODELS_ID_EMPTY_CARDS)
 137→            addUri("models/*/templates", MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES)
 138→            addUri("models/*/templates/#", MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID)
 139→            addUri("models/*/fields", MODELS_ID_FIELDS)
 140→            addUri("schedule/", SCHEDULE)
 141→            addUri("decks/", DECKS)
 142→            addUri("decks/#", DECKS_ID)
 143→            addUri("selected_deck/", DECK_SELECTED)
 144→            addUri("media", MEDIA)
 145→
 146→            for (idx in sDefaultNoteProjectionDBAccess.indices) {
 147→                if (sDefaultNoteProjectionDBAccess[idx] == FlashCardsContract.Note._ID) {
 148→                    sDefaultNoteProjectionDBAccess[idx] = "id as _id"
 149→                }
 150→            }
 151→        }
 152→    }
 153→
 154→    override fun onCreate(): Boolean {
 155→        // Initialize content provider on startup.
 156→        Timber.d("CardContentProvider: onCreate")
 157→        AnkiDroidApp.makeBackendUsable(context!!)
 158→        return true
 159→    }
 160→
 161→    // keeps the nullability declared by the platform
 162→    @Suppress("RedundantNullableReturnType")
 163→    override fun getType(uri: Uri): String? {
 164→        // Find out what data the user is requesting
 165→        return when (sUriMatcher.match(uri)) {
 166→            NOTES_V2, NOTES -> FlashCardsContract.Note.CONTENT_TYPE
 167→            NOTES_ID -> FlashCardsContract.Note.CONTENT_ITEM_TYPE
 168→            NOTES_ID_CARDS, MODELS_ID_EMPTY_CARDS -> FlashCardsContract.Card.CONTENT_TYPE
 169→            NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD -> FlashCardsContract.Card.CONTENT_ITEM_TYPE
 170→            MODELS -> FlashCardsContract.Model.CONTENT_TYPE
 171→            MODELS_ID -> FlashCardsContract.Model.CONTENT_ITEM_TYPE
 172→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES -> FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.CONTENT_TYPE
 173→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID -> FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.CONTENT_ITEM_TYPE
 174→            SCHEDULE -> FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.CONTENT_TYPE
 175→            DECKS, DECK_SELECTED, DECKS_ID -> FlashCardsContract.Deck.CONTENT_TYPE
 176→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("uri $uri is not supported")
 177→        }
 178→    }
 179→
 180→    /** Only enforce permissions for queries and inserts on Android M and above, or if its a 'rogue client'  */
 181→    private fun shouldEnforceQueryOrInsertSecurity(): Boolean {
 182→        return knownRogueClient()
 183→    }
 184→
 185→    /** Enforce permissions for all updates on Android M and above. Otherwise block depending on URI and client app  */
 186→    private fun shouldEnforceUpdateSecurity(uri: Uri): Boolean {
 187→        val whitelist = listOf(NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD, MODELS_ID, MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID, SCHEDULE, DECK_SELECTED)
 188→        return !whitelist.contains(sUriMatcher.match(uri)) || knownRogueClient()
 189→    }
 190→
 191→    override fun query(uri: Uri, projection: Array<String>?, selection: String?, selectionArgs: Array<String>?, order: String?): Cursor? {
 192→        if (!hasReadWritePermission() && shouldEnforceQueryOrInsertSecurity()) {
 193→            throwSecurityException("query", uri)
 194→        }
 195→        val col = CollectionHelper.instance.getColUnsafe(context!!)
 196→            ?: throw IllegalStateException(COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG)
 197→        Timber.d(getLogMessage("query", uri))
 198→
 199→        // Find out what data the user is requesting
 200→        return when (sUriMatcher.match(uri)) {
 201→            NOTES_V2 -> {
 202→                /* Search for notes using direct SQL query */
 203→                val proj = sanitizeNoteProjection(projection)
 204→                val sql = SQLiteQueryBuilder.buildQueryString(false, "notes", proj, selection, null, null, order, null)
 205→                col.db.query(sql, *(selectionArgs ?: arrayOf()))
 206→            }
 207→            NOTES -> {
 208→                /* Search for notes using the libanki browser syntax */
 209→                val proj = sanitizeNoteProjection(projection)
 210→                val query = selection ?: ""
 211→                val noteIds = col.findNotes(query)
 212→                if (noteIds.isNotEmpty()) {
 213→                    val sel = "id in (${noteIds.joinToString(",")})"
 214→                    val sql = SQLiteQueryBuilder.buildQueryString(false, "notes", proj, sel, null, null, order, null)
 215→                    col.db.database.query(sql)
 216→                } else {
 217→                    null
 218→                }
 219→            }
 220→            NOTES_ID -> {
 221→                /* Direct access note with specific ID*/
 222→                val noteId = uri.pathSegments[1]
 223→                val proj = sanitizeNoteProjection(projection)
 224→                val sql = SQLiteQueryBuilder.buildQueryString(false, "notes", proj, "id=?", null, null, order, null)
 225→                col.db.query(sql, noteId)
 226→            }
 227→            NOTES_ID_CARDS -> {
 228→                val currentNote = getNoteFromUri(uri, col)
 229→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Card.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 230→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 231→                for (currentCard: Card in currentNote.cards(col)) {
 232→                    addCardToCursor(currentCard, rv, col, columns)
 233→                }
 234→                rv
 235→            }
 236→            NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD -> {
 237→                val currentCard = getCardFromUri(uri, col)
 238→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Card.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 239→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 240→                addCardToCursor(currentCard, rv, col, columns)
 241→                rv
 242→            }
 243→            MODELS -> {
 244→                val models = col.notetypes
 245→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Model.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 246→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 247→                for (modelId: NoteTypeId in models.ids()) {
 248→                    addModelToCursor(modelId, models, rv, columns)
 249→                }
 250→                rv
 251→            }
 252→            MODELS_ID -> {
 253→                val modelId = getModelIdFromUri(uri, col)
 254→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Model.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 255→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 256→                addModelToCursor(modelId, col.notetypes, rv, columns)
 257→                rv
 258→            }
 259→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES -> {
 260→                /* Direct access model templates */
 261→                val models = col.notetypes
 262→                val currentModel = models.get(getModelIdFromUri(uri, col))
 263→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 264→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 265→                try {
 266→                    val templates = currentModel!!.getJSONArray("tmpls")
 267→                    var idx = 0
 268→                    while (idx < templates.length()) {
 269→                        val template = templates.getJSONObject(idx)
 270→                        addTemplateToCursor(template, currentModel, idx + 1, models, rv, columns)
 271→                        idx++
 272→                    }
 273→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 274→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Model is malformed", e)
 275→                }
 276→                rv
 277→            }
 278→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID -> {
 279→                /* Direct access model template with specific ID */
 280→                val models = col.notetypes
 281→                val ord = uri.lastPathSegment!!.toInt()
 282→                val currentModel = models.get(getModelIdFromUri(uri, col))
 283→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 284→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 285→                try {
 286→                    val template = getTemplateFromUri(uri, col)
 287→                    addTemplateToCursor(template, currentModel, ord + 1, models, rv, columns)
 288→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 289→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Model is malformed", e)
 290→                }
 291→                rv
 292→            }
 293→            SCHEDULE -> {
 294→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 295→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 296→                val selectedDeckBeforeQuery = col.decks.selected()
 297→                var deckIdOfTemporarilySelectedDeck: Long = -1
 298→                var limit = 1 // the number of scheduled cards to return
 299→                var selectionArgIndex = 0
 300→
 301→                // parsing the selection arguments
 302→                if (selection != null) {
 303→                    val args = selection.split(",").toTypedArray() // split selection to get arguments like "limit=?"
 304→                    for (arg: String in args) {
 305→                        val keyAndValue = arg.split("=").toTypedArray() // split arguments into key ("limit") and value ("?")
 306→                        try {
 307→                            // check if value is a placeholder ("?"), if so replace with the next value of selectionArgs
 308→                            val value = if ("?" == keyAndValue[1].trim { it <= ' ' }) selectionArgs!![selectionArgIndex++] else keyAndValue[1]
 309→                            if ("limit" == keyAndValue[0].trim { it <= ' ' }) {
 310→                                limit = value.toInt()
 311→                            } else if ("deckID" == keyAndValue[0].trim { it <= ' ' }) {
 312→                                deckIdOfTemporarilySelectedDeck = value.toLong()
 313→                                if (!selectDeckWithCheck(col, deckIdOfTemporarilySelectedDeck)) {
 314→                                    return rv // if the provided deckID is wrong, return empty cursor.
 315→                                }
 316→                            }
 317→                        } catch (nfe: NumberFormatException) {
 318→                            Timber.w(nfe)
 319→                        }
 320→                    }
 321→                }
 322→
 323→                // retrieve the number of cards provided by the selection parameter "limit"
 324→                var k = 0
 325→                while (k < limit) {
 326→                    val currentCard = col.sched.card ?: break
 327→                    val buttonCount = 4
 328→                    val buttonTexts = JSONArray()
 329→                    var i = 0
 330→                    while (i < buttonCount) {
 331→                        buttonTexts.put(col.sched.nextIvlStr(currentCard, i + 1))
 332→                        i++
 333→                    }
 334→                    addReviewInfoToCursor(currentCard, buttonTexts, buttonCount, rv, col, columns)
 335→                    k++
 336→                }
 337→                if (deckIdOfTemporarilySelectedDeck != -1L) { // if the selected deck was changed
 338→                    // change the selected deck back to the one it was before the query
 339→                    col.decks.select(selectedDeckBeforeQuery)
 340→                }
 341→                rv
 342→            }
 343→            DECKS -> {
 344→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Deck.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 345→                val allDecks = col.sched.deckDueTree()
 346→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 347→                allDecks.forEach {
 348→                    addDeckToCursor(
 349→                        it.did,
 350→                        it.fullDeckName,
 351→                        getDeckCountsFromDueTreeNode(it),
 352→                        rv,
 353→                        col,
 354→                        columns
 355→                    )
 356→                }
 357→                rv
 358→            }
 359→            DECKS_ID -> {
 360→                /* Direct access deck */
 361→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Deck.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 362→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 363→                val allDecks = col.sched.deckDueTree()
 364→                val desiredDeckId = uri.pathSegments[1].toLong()
 365→                allDecks.find(desiredDeckId)?.let {
 366→                    addDeckToCursor(it.did, it.fullDeckName, getDeckCountsFromDueTreeNode(it), rv, col, columns)
 367→                }
 368→                rv
 369→            }
 370→            DECK_SELECTED -> {
 371→                val id = col.decks.selected()
 372→                val name = col.decks.name(id)
 373→                val columns = projection ?: FlashCardsContract.Deck.DEFAULT_PROJECTION
 374→                val rv = MatrixCursor(columns, 1)
 375→                val counts = JSONArray(listOf(col.sched.counts()))
 376→                addDeckToCursor(id, name, counts, rv, col, columns)
 377→                rv
 378→            }
 379→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("uri $uri is not supported")
 380→        }
 381→    }
 382→
 383→    private fun getDeckCountsFromDueTreeNode(deck: DeckNode): JSONArray = JSONArray().apply {
 384→        put(deck.lrnCount)
 385→        put(deck.revCount)
 386→        put(deck.newCount)
 387→    }
 388→
 389→    override fun update(uri: Uri, values: ContentValues?, selection: String?, selectionArgs: Array<String>?): Int {
 390→        if (!hasReadWritePermission() && shouldEnforceUpdateSecurity(uri)) {
 391→            throwSecurityException("update", uri)
 392→        }
 393→        val col = CollectionHelper.instance.getColUnsafe(context!!)
 394→            ?: throw IllegalStateException(COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG)
 395→        col.log(getLogMessage("update", uri))
 396→
 397→        // Find out what data the user is requesting
 398→        val match = sUriMatcher.match(uri)
 399→        var updated = 0 // Number of updated entries (return value)
 400→        when (match) {
 401→            NOTES_V2, NOTES -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to update notes directly (only through data URI)")
 402→            NOTES_ID -> {
 403→                /* Direct access note details
 404→                 */
 405→                val currentNote = getNoteFromUri(uri, col)
 406→                // the key of the ContentValues contains the column name
 407→                // the value of the ContentValues contains the row value.
 408→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 409→                for ((key, tags) in valueSet) {
 410→                    // when the client does not specify FLDS, then don't update the FLDS
 411→                    when (key) {
 412→                        FlashCardsContract.Note.FLDS -> {
 413→                            // Update FLDS
 414→                            Timber.d("CardContentProvider: flds update...")
 415→                            val newFldsEncoded = tags as String
 416→                            val flds = Utils.splitFields(newFldsEncoded)
 417→                            // Check that correct number of flds specified
 418→                            require(flds.size == currentNote.fields.size) { "Incorrect flds argument : $newFldsEncoded" }
 419→                            // Update the note
 420→                            var idx = 0
 421→                            while (idx < flds.size) {
 422→                                currentNote.setField(idx, flds[idx])
 423→                                idx++
 424→                            }
 425→                            updated++
 426→                        }
 427→                        FlashCardsContract.Note.TAGS -> {
 428→                            // Update tags
 429→                            Timber.d("CardContentProvider: tags update...")
 430→                            if (tags != null) {
 431→                                currentNote.setTagsFromStr(col, tags.toString())
 432→                            }
 433→                            updated++
 434→                        }
 435→                        else -> {
 436→                            // Unsupported column
 437→                            throw IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported column: $key")
 438→                        }
 439→                    }
 440→                }
 441→                Timber.d("CardContentProvider: Saving note...")
 442→                col.updateNote(currentNote)
 443→            }
 444→            NOTES_ID_CARDS -> throw UnsupportedOperationException("Not yet implemented")
 445→            NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD -> {
 446→                val currentCard = getCardFromUri(uri, col)
 447→                var isDeckUpdate = false
 448→                var did = Decks.NOT_FOUND_DECK_ID
 449→                // the key of the ContentValues contains the column name
 450→                // the value of the ContentValues contains the row value.
 451→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 452→                for ((key) in valueSet) {
 453→                    // Only updates on deck id is supported
 454→                    isDeckUpdate = key == FlashCardsContract.Card.DECK_ID
 455→                    did = values.getAsLong(key)
 456→                }
 457→                require(!col.decks.isFiltered(did)) { "Cards cannot be moved to a filtered deck" }
 458→                /* now update the card
 459→                 */if (isDeckUpdate && did >= 0) {
 460→                    Timber.d("CardContentProvider: Moving card to other deck...")
 461→                    currentCard.did = did
 462→                    col.updateCard(currentCard)
 463→
 464→                    updated++
 465→                } else {
 466→                    // User tries an operation that is not (yet?) supported.
 467→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Currently only updates of decks are supported")
 468→                }
 469→            }
 470→            MODELS -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot update models in bulk")
 471→            MODELS_ID -> {
 472→                // Get the input parameters
 473→                val newModelName = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.NAME)
 474→                val newCss = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.CSS)
 475→                val newDid = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.DECK_ID)
 476→                val newFieldList = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAMES)
 477→                require(newFieldList == null) {
 478→                    // Changing the field names would require a full-sync
 479→                    "Field names cannot be changed via provider"
 480→                }
 481→                val newSortf = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.SORT_FIELD_INDEX)
 482→                val newType = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.TYPE)
 483→                val newLatexPost = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_POST)
 484→                val newLatexPre = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_PRE)
 485→                // Get the original note JSON
 486→                val model = col.notetypes.get(getModelIdFromUri(uri, col))
 487→                try {
 488→                    // Update model name and/or css
 489→                    if (newModelName != null) {
 490→                        model!!.put("name", newModelName)
 491→                        updated++
 492→                    }
 493→                    if (newCss != null) {
 494→                        model!!.put("css", newCss)
 495→                        updated++
 496→                    }
 497→                    if (newDid != null) {
 498→                        if (col.decks.isFiltered(newDid.toLong())) {
 499→                            throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot set a filtered deck as default deck for a model")
 500→                        }
 501→                        model!!.put("did", newDid)
 502→                        updated++
 503→                    }
 504→                    if (newSortf != null) {
 505→                        model!!.put("sortf", newSortf)
 506→                        updated++
 507→                    }
 508→                    if (newType != null) {
 509→                        model!!.put("type", newType)
 510→                        updated++
 511→                    }
 512→                    if (newLatexPost != null) {
 513→                        model!!.put("latexPost", newLatexPost)
 514→                        updated++
 515→                    }
 516→                    if (newLatexPre != null) {
 517→                        model!!.put("latexPre", newLatexPre)
 518→                        updated++
 519→                    }
 520→                    col.notetypes.save(model!!)
 521→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 522→                    Timber.e(e, "JSONException updating model")
 523→                }
 524→            }
 525→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot update templates in bulk")
 526→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID -> {
 527→                val mid = values!!.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.MODEL_ID)
 528→                val ord = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.ORD)
 529→                val name = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.NAME)
 530→                val qfmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.QUESTION_FORMAT)
 531→                val afmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.ANSWER_FORMAT)
 532→                val bqfmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_QUESTION_FORMAT)
 533→                val bafmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_ANSWER_FORMAT)
 534→                // Throw exception if read-only fields are included
 535→                if (mid != null || ord != null) {
 536→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Updates to mid or ord are not allowed")
 537→                }
 538→                // Update the model
 539→                try {
 540→                    val templateOrd = uri.lastPathSegment!!.toInt()
 541→                    val existingModel = col.notetypes.get(getModelIdFromUri(uri, col))
 542→                    val templates = existingModel!!.getJSONArray("tmpls")
 543→                    val template = templates.getJSONObject(templateOrd)
 544→                    if (name != null) {
 545→                        template.put("name", name)
 546→                        updated++
 547→                    }
 548→                    if (qfmt != null) {
 549→                        template.put("qfmt", qfmt)
 550→                        updated++
 551→                    }
 552→                    if (afmt != null) {
 553→                        template.put("afmt", afmt)
 554→                        updated++
 555→                    }
 556→                    if (bqfmt != null) {
 557→                        template.put("bqfmt", bqfmt)
 558→                        updated++
 559→                    }
 560→                    if (bafmt != null) {
 561→                        template.put("bafmt", bafmt)
 562→                        updated++
 563→                    }
 564→                    // Save the model
 565→                    templates.put(templateOrd, template)
 566→                    existingModel.put("tmpls", templates)
 567→                    col.notetypes.save(existingModel)
 568→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 569→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Model is malformed", e)
 570→                }
 571→            }
 572→            SCHEDULE -> {
 573→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 574→                var cardOrd = -1
 575→                var noteID: Long = -1
 576→                var ease = -1
 577→                var timeTaken: Long = -1
 578→                var bury = -1
 579→                var suspend = -1
 580→                for ((key) in valueSet) {
 581→                    when (key) {
 582→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.NOTE_ID -> noteID = values.getAsLong(key)
 583→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.CARD_ORD -> cardOrd = values.getAsInteger(key)
 584→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.EASE -> ease = values.getAsInteger(key)
 585→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.TIME_TAKEN -> timeTaken = values.getAsLong(key)
 586→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.BURY -> bury = values.getAsInteger(key)
 587→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.SUSPEND -> suspend = values.getAsInteger(key)
 588→                    }
 589→                }
 590→                if (cardOrd != -1 && noteID != -1L) {
 591→                    val cardToAnswer: Card = getCard(noteID, cardOrd, col)
 592→                    @Suppress("SENSELESS_COMPARISON")
 593→                    @KotlinCleanup("based on getCard() method, cardToAnswer does seem to be not null")
 594→                    if (cardToAnswer != null) {
 595→                        if (bury == 1) {
 596→                            // bury card
 597→                            buryOrSuspendCard(col, cardToAnswer, true)
 598→                        } else if (suspend == 1) {
 599→                            // suspend card
 600→                            buryOrSuspendCard(col, cardToAnswer, false)
 601→                        } else {
 602→                            answerCard(col, cardToAnswer, ease, timeTaken)
 603→                        }
 604→                        updated++
 605→                    } else {
 606→                        Timber.e(
 607→                            "Requested card with noteId %d and cardOrd %d was not found. Either the provided " +
 608→                                "noteId/cardOrd were wrong or the card has been deleted in the meantime.",
 609→                            noteID,
 610→                            cardOrd
 611→                        )
 612→                    }
 613→                }
 614→            }
 615→            DECKS -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Can't update decks in bulk")
 616→            DECKS_ID -> throw UnsupportedOperationException("Not yet implemented")
 617→            DECK_SELECTED -> {
 618→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 619→                for ((key) in valueSet) {
 620→                    if (key == FlashCardsContract.Deck.DECK_ID) {
 621→                        val deckId = values.getAsLong(key)
 622→                        if (selectDeckWithCheck(col, deckId)) {
 623→                            updated++
 624→                        }
 625→                    }
 626→                }
 627→            }
 628→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("uri $uri is not supported")
 629→        }
 630→        return updated
 631→    }

 655→    /**
 656→     * This can be used to insert multiple notes into a single deck. The deck is specified as a query parameter.
 657→     *
 658→     * For example: content://com.ichi2.anki.flashcards/notes?deckId=1234567890123
 659→     *
 660→     * @param uri content Uri
 661→     * @param values for notes uri, it is acceptable for values to contain null items. Such items will be skipped
 662→     * @return number of notes added (does not include existing notes that were updated)
 663→     */
 664→    override fun bulkInsert(uri: Uri, values: Array<ContentValues>): Int {
 665→        if (!hasReadWritePermission() && shouldEnforceQueryOrInsertSecurity()) {
 666→            throwSecurityException("bulkInsert", uri)
 667→        }
 668→
 669→        // by default, #bulkInsert simply calls insert for each item in #values
 670→        // but in some cases, we want to override this behavior
 671→        val match = sUriMatcher.match(uri)
 672→        if (match == NOTES) {
 673→            val deckIdStr = uri.getQueryParameter(FlashCardsContract.Note.DECK_ID_QUERY_PARAM)
 674→            if (deckIdStr != null) {
 675→                try {
 676→                    val deckId = deckIdStr.toLong()
 677→                    return bulkInsertNotes(values, deckId)
 678→                } catch (e: NumberFormatException) {
 679→                    Timber.d(e, "Invalid %s: %s", FlashCardsContract.Note.DECK_ID_QUERY_PARAM, deckIdStr)
 680→                }
 681→            }
 682→            // deckId not specified, so default to #super implementation (as in spec version 1)
 683→        }
 684→        return super.bulkInsert(uri, values)
 685→    }

 687→    /**
 688→     * This implementation optimizes for when the notes are grouped according to model.
 689→     */
 690→    private fun bulkInsertNotes(valuesArr: Array<ContentValues>?, deckId: DeckId): Int {
 691→        if (valuesArr == null || valuesArr.isEmpty()) {
 692→            return 0
 693→        }
 694→        val col = CollectionHelper.instance.getColUnsafe(context!!)
 695→            ?: throw IllegalStateException(COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG)
 696→        if (col.decks.isFiltered(deckId)) {
 697→            throw IllegalArgumentException("A filtered deck cannot be specified as the deck in bulkInsertNotes")
 698→        }
 699→        col.log(String.format(Locale.US, "bulkInsertNotes: %d items.\n%s", valuesArr.size, getLogMessage("bulkInsert", null)))
 700→
 701→        var result = 0
 702→        for (i in valuesArr.indices) {
 703→            val values: ContentValues = valuesArr[i]
 704→            val flds = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.FLDS) ?: continue
 705→//                val allowEmpty = AllowEmpty.fromBoolean(values.getAsBoolean(FlashCardsContract.Note.ALLOW_EMPTY))
 706→            val thisModelId = values.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.Note.MID)
 707→            if (thisModelId == null || thisModelId < 0) {
 708→                Timber.d("Unable to get model at index: %d", i)
 709→                continue
 710→            }
 711→            val fldsArray = Utils.splitFields(flds)
 712→            // Create empty note
 713→            val newNote = col.run { Note.fromNotetypeId(thisModelId) }
 714→            // Set fields
 715→            // Check that correct number of flds specified
 716→            if (fldsArray.size != newNote.fields.size) {
 717→                throw IllegalArgumentException("Incorrect flds argument : $flds")
 718→            }
 719→            for (idx in fldsArray.indices) {
 720→                newNote.setField(idx, fldsArray[idx])
 721→            }
 722→            // Set tags
 723→            val tags = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.TAGS)
 724→            if (tags != null) {
 725→                newNote.setTagsFromStr(col, tags)
 726→            }
 727→            // Add to collection
 728→            col.addNote(newNote, deckId)
 729→            for (card: Card in newNote.cards(col)) {
 730→                card.did = deckId
 731→                col.updateCard(card)
 732→            }
 733→            result++
 734→        }
 735→
 736→        return result
 737→    }

 739→    override fun insert(uri: Uri, values: ContentValues?): Uri? {
 740→        if (!hasReadWritePermission() && shouldEnforceQueryOrInsertSecurity()) {
 741→            throwSecurityException("insert", uri)
 742→        }
 743→        val col = CollectionHelper.instance.getColUnsafe(context!!)
 744→            ?: throw IllegalStateException(COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG)
 745→        col.log(getLogMessage("insert", uri))
 746→
 747→        // Find out what data the user is requesting
 748→        return when (sUriMatcher.match(uri)) {
 749→            NOTES -> {
 750→                /* Insert new note with specified fields and tags
 751→                 */
 752→                val modelId = values!!.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.Note.MID)
 753→                val flds = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.FLDS)
 754→                val tags = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.TAGS)
 755→//                val allowEmpty = AllowEmpty.fromBoolean(values.getAsBoolean(FlashCardsContract.Note.ALLOW_EMPTY))
 756→                // Create empty note
 757→                val newNote = col.run { Note.fromNotetypeId(modelId) }
 758→                // Set fields
 759→                val fldsArray = Utils.splitFields(flds)
 760→                // Check that correct number of flds specified
 761→                if (fldsArray.size != newNote.fields.size) {
 762→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Incorrect flds argument : $flds")
 763→                }
 764→                var idx = 0
 765→                while (idx < fldsArray.size) {
 766→                    newNote.setField(idx, fldsArray[idx])
 767→                    idx++
 768→                }
 769→                // Set tags
 770→                if (tags != null) {
 771→                    newNote.setTagsFromStr(col, tags)
 772→                }
 773→                // Add to collection
 774→                col.addNote(newNote)
 775→
 776→                Uri.withAppendedPath(FlashCardsContract.Note.CONTENT_URI, newNote.id.toString())
 777→            }
 778→            NOTES_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert note with specific ID")
 779→            NOTES_ID_CARDS, NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert cards directly (only through NOTES)")
 780→            MODELS -> {
 781→                // Get input arguments
 782→                val modelName = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.NAME)
 783→                val css = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.CSS)
 784→                val did = values.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.Model.DECK_ID)
 785→                val fieldNames = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAMES)
 786→                val numCards = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.NUM_CARDS)
 787→                val sortf = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.SORT_FIELD_INDEX)
 788→                val type = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.TYPE)
 789→                val latexPost = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_POST)
 790→                val latexPre = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_PRE)
 791→                // Throw exception if required fields empty
 792→                if (modelName == null || fieldNames == null || numCards == null) {
 793→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Model name, field_names, and num_cards can't be empty")
 794→                }
 795→                if (did != null && col.decks.isFiltered(did)) {
 796→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot set a filtered deck as default deck for a model")
 797→                }
 798→                // Create a new model
 799→                val mm = col.notetypes
 800→                val newModel = mm.new(modelName)
 801→                return try {
 802→                    // Add the fields
 803→                    val allFields = Utils.splitFields(fieldNames)
 804→                    for (f: String? in allFields) {
 805→                        mm.addFieldInNewModel(newModel, mm.newField(f!!))
 806→                    }
 807→                    // Add some empty card templates
 808→                    var idx = 0
 809→                    while (idx < numCards) {
 810→                        val cardName = CollectionManager.TR.cardTemplatesCard(idx + 1)
 811→                        val t = Notetypes.newTemplate(cardName)
 812→                        t.put("qfmt", "{{${allFields[0]}}}")
 813→                        var answerField: String? = allFields[0]
 814→                        if (allFields.size > 1) {
 815→                            answerField = allFields[1]
 816→                        }
 817→                        t.put("afmt", "{{FrontSide}}\\n\\n<hr id=answer>\\n\\n{{$answerField}}")
 818→                        mm.addTemplateInNewModel(newModel, t)
 819→                        idx++
 820→                    }
 821→                    // Add the CSS if specified
 822→                    if (css != null) {
 823→                        newModel.put("css", css)
 824→                    }
 825→                    // Add the did if specified
 826→                    if (did != null) {
 827→                        newModel.put("did", did)
 828→                    }
 829→                    if (sortf != null && sortf < allFields.size) {
 830→                        newModel.put("sortf", sortf)
 831→                    }
 832→                    if (type != null) {
 833→                        newModel.put("type", type)
 834→                    }
 835→                    if (latexPost != null) {
 836→                        newModel.put("latexPost", latexPost)
 837→                    }
 838→                    if (latexPre != null) {
 839→                        newModel.put("latexPre", latexPre)
 840→                    }
 841→                    // Add the model to collection (from this point on edits will require a full-sync)
 842→                    mm.add(newModel)
 843→
 844→                    // Get the mid and return a URI
 845→                    val mid = newModel.getLong("id").toString()
 846→                    Uri.withAppendedPath(FlashCardsContract.Model.CONTENT_URI, mid)
 847→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 848→                    Timber.e(e, "Could not set a field of new model %s", modelName)
 849→                    null
 850→                }
 851→            }
 852→            MODELS_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert model with specific ID")
 853→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES -> {
 854→                run {
 855→                    val notetypes: Notetypes = col.notetypes
 856→                    val mid: NoteTypeId = getModelIdFromUri(uri, col)
 857→                    val existingModel: NotetypeJson = notetypes.get(mid)
 858→                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("model missing: $mid")
 859→                    val name: String = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.NAME)
 860→                    val qfmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.QUESTION_FORMAT)
 861→                    val afmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.ANSWER_FORMAT)
 862→                    val bqfmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_QUESTION_FORMAT)
 863→                    val bafmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_ANSWER_FORMAT)
 864→                    try {
 865→                        var t: JSONObject = Notetypes.newTemplate(name)
 866→                        t.put("qfmt", qfmt)
 867→                        t.put("afmt", afmt)
 868→                        t.put("bqfmt", bqfmt)
 869→                        t.put("bafmt", bafmt)
 870→                        notetypes.addTemplate(existingModel, t)
 871→                        notetypes.update(existingModel)
 872→                        t = existingModel.tmpls.get(existingModel.tmpls.length() - 1) as JSONObject
 873→                        return ContentUris.withAppendedId(uri, t.getInt("ord").toLong())
 874→                    } catch (e: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
 875→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to add template without user requesting/accepting full-sync", e)
 876→                    } catch (e: JSONException) {
 877→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to get ord from new template", e)
 878→                    }
 879→                }
 880→            }
 881→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert template with specific ORD")
 882→            MODELS_ID_FIELDS -> {
 883→                run {
 884→                    val notetypes: Notetypes = col.notetypes
 885→                    val mid: NoteTypeId = getModelIdFromUri(uri, col)
 886→                    val existingModel: NotetypeJson = notetypes.get(mid)
 887→                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("model missing: $mid")
 888→                    val name: String = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAME)
 889→                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("field name missing for model: $mid")
 890→                    val field: JSONObject = notetypes.newField(name)
 891→                    try {
 892→                        notetypes.addField(existingModel, field)
 893→
 894→                        val flds: JSONArray = existingModel.getJSONArray("flds")
 895→                        return ContentUris.withAppendedId(uri, (flds.length() - 1).toLong())
 896→                    } catch (e: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
 897→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to insert field: $name", e)
 898→                    } catch (e: JSONException) {
 899→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to get newly created field: $name", e)
 900→                    }
 901→                }
 902→            }
 903→            SCHEDULE -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to perform insert operation on schedule")
 904→            DECKS -> {
 905→                // Insert new deck with specified name
 906→                val deckName = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Deck.DECK_NAME)
 907→                var did = col.decks.idForName(deckName)
 908→                if (did != null) {
 909→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Deck name already exists: $deckName")
 910→                }
 911→                if (!Decks.isValidDeckName(deckName)) {
 912→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Invalid deck name '$deckName'")
 913→                }
 914→                try {
 915→                    did = col.decks.id(deckName)
 916→                } catch (filteredSubdeck: BackendDeckIsFilteredException) {
 917→                    throw IllegalArgumentException(filteredSubdeck.message)
 918→                }
 919→                val deck: Deck = col.decks.get(did)!!
 920→                @KotlinCleanup("remove the null check if deck is found to be not null in DeckManager.get(Long)")
 921→                @Suppress("SENSELESS_COMPARISON")
 922→                if (deck != null) {
 923→                    try {
 924→                        val deckDesc = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Deck.DECK_DESC)
 925→                        if (deckDesc != null) {
 926→                            deck.put("desc", deckDesc)
 927→                        }
 928→                    } catch (e: JSONException) {
 929→                        Timber.e(e, "Could not set a field of new deck %s", deckName)
 930→                        return null
 931→                    }
 932→                }
 933→                Uri.withAppendedPath(FlashCardsContract.Deck.CONTENT_ALL_URI, did.toString())
 934→            }
 935→            DECK_SELECTED -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Selected deck can only be queried and updated")
 936→            DECKS_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert deck with specific ID")
 937→            MEDIA ->
 938→                // insert a media file
 939→                // contentvalue should have data and preferredFileName values
 940→                insertMediaFile(values, col)
 941→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("uri $uri is not supported")
 942→        }
 943→    }

 945→    private fun insertMediaFile(values: ContentValues?, col: Collection): Uri? {
 946→        // Insert media file using libanki.Media.addFile and return Uri for the inserted file.
 947→        val fileUri = Uri.parse(values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.AnkiMedia.FILE_URI))
 948→        val preferredName = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.AnkiMedia.PREFERRED_NAME)
 949→        return try {
 950→            val cR = context!!.contentResolver
 951→            val media = col.media
 952→            // idea, open input stream and save to cache directory, then
 953→            // pass this (hopefully temporary) file to the media.addFile function.
 954→            val fileMimeType = MimeTypeMap.getSingleton().getExtensionFromMimeType(cR.getType(fileUri)) // return eg "jpeg"
 955→            // should we be enforcing strict mimetypes? which types?
 956→            val tempFile: File
 957→            val externalCacheDir = context!!.externalCacheDir
 958→            if (externalCacheDir == null) {
 959→                Timber.e("createUI() unable to get external cache directory")
 960→                return null
 961→            }
 962→            val tempMediaDir = File(externalCacheDir.absolutePath + "/temp-media")
 963→            if (!tempMediaDir.exists() && !tempMediaDir.mkdir()) {
 964→                Timber.e("temp-media dir did not exist and could not be created")
 965→                return null
 966→            }
 967→            try {
 968→                tempFile = File.createTempFile(
 969→                    preferredName + "_", // the beginning of the filename.
 970→                    ".$fileMimeType", // this is the extension, if null, '.tmp' is used, need to get the extension from MIME type?
 971→                    tempMediaDir
 972→                )
 973→                tempFile.deleteOnExit()
 974→            } catch (e: Exception) {
 975→                Timber.w(e, "Could not create temporary media file. ")
 976→                return null
 977→            }
 978→            internalizeUri(fileUri, tempFile, cR)
 979→            val fname = media.addFile(tempFile)
 980→            Timber.d("insert -> MEDIA: fname = %s", fname)
 981→            val f = File(fname)
 982→            Timber.d("insert -> MEDIA: f = %s", f)
 983→            val uriFromF = Uri.fromFile(f)
 984→            Timber.d("insert -> MEDIA: uriFromF = %s", uriFromF)
 985→            Uri.fromFile(File(fname))
 986→        } catch (e: IOException) {
 987→            Timber.w(e, "insert failed from %s", fileUri)
 988→            null
 989→        } catch (e: EmptyMediaException) {
 990→            Timber.w(e, "insert failed from %s", fileUri)
 991→            null
 992→        }
 993→    }

 995→    private fun addModelToCursor(modelId: NoteTypeId, notetypes: Notetypes, rv: MatrixCursor, columns: Array<String>) {
 996→        val jsonObject = notetypes.get(modelId)
 997→        val rb = rv.newRow()
 998→        try {
 999→            for (column in columns) {
1000→                when (column) {
1001→                    FlashCardsContract.Model._ID -> rb.add(modelId)
1002→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.NAME -> rb.add(jsonObject!!.getString("name"))
1003→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAMES -> {
1004→                        val flds = jsonObject!!.getJSONArray("flds")
1005→                        val allFlds = arrayOfNulls<String>(flds.length())
1006→                        var idx = 0
1007→                        while (idx < flds.length()) {
1008→                            allFlds[idx] = flds.getJSONObject(idx).optString("name", "")
1009→                            idx++
1010→                        }
1011→                        @KotlinCleanup("remove requireNoNulls")
1012→                        rb.add(Utils.joinFields(allFlds.requireNoNulls()))
1013→                    }
1014→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.NUM_CARDS -> rb.add(jsonObject!!.getJSONArray("tmpls").length())
1015→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.CSS -> rb.add(jsonObject!!.getString("css"))
1016→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.DECK_ID -> // #6378 - Anki Desktop changed schema temporarily to allow null
1017→                        rb.add(jsonObject!!.optLong("did", Consts.DEFAULT_DECK_ID))
1018→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.SORT_FIELD_INDEX -> rb.add(jsonObject!!.getLong("sortf"))
1019→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.TYPE -> rb.add(jsonObject!!.getLong("type"))
1020→                    FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_POST -> rb.add(jsonObject!!.getString("latexPost"))

content.text: I have analyzed the issue where images with a `#` (hashtag) in their filenames were not displayed correctly in AnkiDroid. ### Root Cause The issue was in the `parseSourcesToFileScheme` function within `TemplateManager.kt`. This function uses `java.net.URI` to parse the `src` attribute of `` tags. When a filename contains an unencoded `#`, `java.net.URI` interprets everything after the `#` as a URI fragment. The code was previously only using `attrUri.path`, which caused it to lose the part of the filename after the hashtag. For example, for ``: - `attrUri.path` became `"image"` - `attrUri.fragment` became `"name.png"` - The resulting file path used was `mediaDir + "/image"`, which is incorrect. ### Fix I modified `TemplateManager.kt` to correctly reconstruct the full filename by appending the fragment back to the path when the URI has no scheme (indicating a relative path to a local media file). This handles both encoded hashtags (where the hashtag is part of the path) and unencoded hashtags (where the hashtag and following text are in the fragment). The fix was verified with a new test case that specifically covers: 1. Images with unencoded hashtags in the filename. 2. Images with encoded hashtags (`%23`) in the filename. 3. Videos with hashtags in the filename (handled via `parseVideos` and `getFileUri`, which already correctly used the multi-argument `URI` constructor that handles escaping). ### Changes - Modified `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/libanki/TemplateManager.kt`: - Updated `replaceWithFileScheme` inside `parseSourcesToFileScheme` to include the URI fragment when reconstructing the local file path. ```kotlin <<<< val path = Paths.get(mediaDir, attrUri.path).toString() ==== val uriPath = attrUri.path ?: "" val uriFragment = attrUri.fragment val fullPath = if (uriFragment != null) "$uriPath#$uriFragment" else uriPath val path = Paths.get(mediaDir, fullPath).toString() >>>> ``` This change ensures that local media files with `#` in their names are correctly located and converted to the `file:///` scheme for proper display in the WebView.

 110→        private fun sanitizeNoteProjection(projection: Array<String>?): Array<String> {

 419→                            // Update the note
 420→                            var idx = 0
 421→                            while (idx < flds.size) {
 422→                                currentNote.setField(idx, flds[idx])
 423→                                idx++
 424→                            }
 425→                            updated++
 426→                        }
 427→                        FlashCardsContract.Note.TAGS -> {
 428→                            // Update tags
 429→                            Timber.d("CardContentProvider: tags update...")
 430→                            if (tags != null) {
 431→                                currentNote.setTagsFromStr(col, tags.toString())
 432→                            }
 433→                            updated++
 434→                        }
 435→                        else -> {
 436→                            // Unsupported column
 437→                            throw IllegalArgumentException("Unsupported column: $key")
 438→                        }
 439→                    }
 440→                }
 441→                Timber.d("CardContentProvider: Saving note...")
 442→                col.updateNote(currentNote)
 443→            }
 444→            NOTES_ID_CARDS -> throw UnsupportedOperationException("Not yet implemented")
 445→            NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD -> {
 446→                val currentCard = getCardFromUri(uri, col)
 447→                var isDeckUpdate = false
 448→                var did = Decks.NOT_FOUND_DECK_ID
 449→                // the key of the ContentValues contains the column name
 450→                // the value of the ContentValues contains the row value.
 451→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 452→                for ((key) in valueSet) {
 453→                    // Only updates on deck id is supported
 454→                    isDeckUpdate = key == FlashCardsContract.Card.DECK_ID
 455→                    did = values.getAsLong(key)
 456→                }
 457→                require(!col.decks.isFiltered(did)) { "Cards cannot be moved to a filtered deck" }
 458→                /* now update the card
 459→                 */if (isDeckUpdate && did >= 0) {
 460→                    Timber.d("CardContentProvider: Moving card to other deck...")
 461→                    currentCard.did = did
 462→                    col.updateCard(currentCard)
 463→
 464→                    updated++
 465→                } else {
 466→                    // User tries an operation that is not (yet?) supported.
 467→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Currently only updates of decks are supported")
 468→                }
 469→            }
 470→            MODELS -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot update models in bulk")
 471→            MODELS_ID -> {
 472→                // Get the input parameters
 473→                val newModelName = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.NAME)
 474→                val newCss = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.CSS)
 475→                val newDid = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.DECK_ID)
 476→                val newFieldList = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAMES)
 477→                require(newFieldList == null) {
 478→                    // Changing the field names would require a full-sync
 479→                    "Field names cannot be changed via provider"
 480→                }
 481→                val newSortf = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.SORT_FIELD_INDEX)
 482→                val newType = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.TYPE)
 483→                val newLatexPost = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_POST)
 484→                val newLatexPre = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_PRE)
 485→                // Get the original note JSON
 486→                val model = col.notetypes.get(getModelIdFromUri(uri, col))
 487→                try {
 488→                    // Update model name and/or css
 489→                    if (newModelName != null) {
 490→                        model!!.put("name", newModelName)
 491→                        updated++
 492→                    }
 493→                    if (newCss != null) {
 494→                        model!!.put("css", newCss)
 495→                        updated++
 496→                    }
 497→                    if (newDid != null) {
 498→                        if (col.decks.isFiltered(newDid.toLong())) {
 499→                            throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot set a filtered deck as default deck for a model")
 500→                        }
 501→                        model!!.put("did", newDid)
 502→                        updated++
 503→                    }
 504→                    if (newSortf != null) {
 505→                        model!!.put("sortf", newSortf)
 506→                        updated++
 507→                    }
 508→                    if (newType != null) {
 509→                        model!!.put("type", newType)
 510→                        updated++
 511→                    }
 512→                    if (newLatexPost != null) {
 513→                        model!!.put("latexPost", newLatexPost)
 514→                        updated++
 515→                    }
 516→                    if (newLatexPre != null) {
 517→                        model!!.put("latexPre", newLatexPre)
 518→                        updated++
 519→                    }
 520→                    col.notetypes.save(model!!)
 521→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 522→                    Timber.e(e, "JSONException updating model")
 523→                }
 524→            }
 525→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot update templates in bulk")
 526→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID -> {
 527→                val mid = values!!.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.MODEL_ID)
 528→                val ord = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.ORD)
 529→                val name = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.NAME)
 530→                val qfmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.QUESTION_FORMAT)
 531→                val afmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.ANSWER_FORMAT)
 532→                val bqfmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_QUESTION_FORMAT)
 533→                val bafmt = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_ANSWER_FORMAT)
 534→                // Throw exception if read-only fields are included
 535→                if (mid != null || ord != null) {
 536→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Updates to mid or ord are not allowed")
 537→                }
 538→                // Update the model
 539→                try {
 540→                    val templateOrd = uri.lastPathSegment!!.toInt()
 541→                    val existingModel = col.notetypes.get(getModelIdFromUri(uri, col))
 542→                    val templates = existingModel!!.getJSONArray("tmpls")
 543→                    val template = templates.getJSONObject(templateOrd)
 544→                    if (name != null) {
 545→                        template.put("name", name)
 546→                        updated++
 547→                    }
 548→                    if (qfmt != null) {
 549→                        template.put("qfmt", qfmt)
 550→                        updated++
 551→                    }
 552→                    if (afmt != null) {
 553→                        template.put("afmt", afmt)
 554→                        updated++
 555→                    }
 556→                    if (bqfmt != null) {
 557→                        template.put("bqfmt", bqfmt)
 558→                        updated++
 559→                    }
 560→                    if (bafmt != null) {
 561→                        template.put("bafmt", bafmt)
 562→                        updated++
 563→                    }
 564→                    // Save the model
 565→                    templates.put(templateOrd, template)
 566→                    existingModel.put("tmpls", templates)
 567→                    col.notetypes.save(existingModel)
 568→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 569→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Model is malformed", e)
 570→                }
 571→            }
 572→            SCHEDULE -> {
 573→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 574→                var cardOrd = -1
 575→                var noteID: Long = -1
 576→                var ease = -1
 577→                var timeTaken: Long = -1
 578→                var bury = -1
 579→                var suspend = -1
 580→                for ((key) in valueSet) {
 581→                    when (key) {
 582→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.NOTE_ID -> noteID = values.getAsLong(key)
 583→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.CARD_ORD -> cardOrd = values.getAsInteger(key)
 584→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.EASE -> ease = values.getAsInteger(key)
 585→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.TIME_TAKEN -> timeTaken = values.getAsLong(key)
 586→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.BURY -> bury = values.getAsInteger(key)
 587→                        FlashCardsContract.ReviewInfo.SUSPEND -> suspend = values.getAsInteger(key)
 588→                    }
 589→                }
 590→                if (cardOrd != -1 && noteID != -1L) {
 591→                    val cardToAnswer: Card = getCard(noteID, cardOrd, col)
 592→                    @Suppress("SENSELESS_COMPARISON")
 593→                    @KotlinCleanup("based on getCard() method, cardToAnswer does seem to be not null")
 594→                    if (cardToAnswer != null) {
 595→                        if (bury == 1) {
 596→                            // bury card
 597→                            buryOrSuspendCard(col, cardToAnswer, true)
 598→                        } else if (suspend == 1) {
 599→                            // suspend card
 600→                            buryOrSuspendCard(col, cardToAnswer, false)
 601→                        } else {
 602→                            answerCard(col, cardToAnswer, ease, timeTaken)
 603→                        }
 604→                        updated++
 605→                    } else {
 606→                        Timber.e(
 607→                            "Requested card with noteId %d and cardOrd %d was not found. Either the provided " +
 608→                                "noteId/cardOrd were wrong or the card has been deleted in the meantime.",
 609→                            noteID,
 610→                            cardOrd
 611→                        )
 612→                    }
 613→                }
 614→            }
 615→            DECKS -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Can't update decks in bulk")
 616→            DECKS_ID -> throw UnsupportedOperationException("Not yet implemented")
 617→            DECK_SELECTED -> {
 618→                val valueSet = values!!.valueSet()
 619→                for ((key) in valueSet) {
 620→                    if (key == FlashCardsContract.Deck.DECK_ID) {
 621→                        val deckId = values.getAsLong(key)
 622→                        if (selectDeckWithCheck(col, deckId)) {
 623→                            updated++
 624→                        }
 625→                    }
 626→                }
 627→            }
 628→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("uri $uri is not supported")
 629→        }
 630→        return updated
 631→    }

 655→    /**
 656→     * This can be used to insert multiple notes into a single deck. The deck is specified as a query parameter.
 657→     *
 658→     * For example: content://com.ichi2.anki.flashcards/notes?deckId=1234567890123
 659→     *
 660→     * @param uri content Uri
 661→     * @param values for notes uri, it is acceptable for values to contain null items. Such items will be skipped
 662→     * @return number of notes added (does not include existing notes that were updated)
 663→     */
 664→    override fun bulkInsert(uri: Uri, values: Array<ContentValues>): Int {
 665→        if (!hasReadWritePermission() && shouldEnforceQueryOrInsertSecurity()) {
 666→            throwSecurityException("bulkInsert", uri)
 667→        }
 668→
 669→        // by default, #bulkInsert simply calls insert for each item in #values
 670→        // but in some cases, we want to override this behavior
 671→        val match = sUriMatcher.match(uri)
 672→        if (match == NOTES) {
 673→            val deckIdStr = uri.getQueryParameter(FlashCardsContract.Note.DECK_ID_QUERY_PARAM)
 674→            if (deckIdStr != null) {
 675→                try {
 676→                    val deckId = deckIdStr.toLong()
 677→                    return bulkInsertNotes(values, deckId)
 678→                } catch (e: NumberFormatException) {
 679→                    Timber.d(e, "Invalid %s: %s", FlashCardsContract.Note.DECK_ID_QUERY_PARAM, deckIdStr)
 680→                }
 681→            }
 682→            // deckId not specified, so default to #super implementation (as in spec version 1)
 683→        }
 684→        return super.bulkInsert(uri, values)
 685→    }

 687→    /**
 688→     * This implementation optimizes for when the notes are grouped according to model.
 689→     */
 690→    private fun bulkInsertNotes(valuesArr: Array<ContentValues>?, deckId: DeckId): Int {
 691→        if (valuesArr == null || valuesArr.isEmpty()) {
 692→            return 0
 693→        }
 694→        val col = CollectionHelper.instance.getColUnsafe(context!!)
 695→            ?: throw IllegalStateException(COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG)
 696→        if (col.decks.isFiltered(deckId)) {
 697→            throw IllegalArgumentException("A filtered deck cannot be specified as the deck in bulkInsertNotes")
 698→        }
 699→        col.log(String.format(Locale.US, "bulkInsertNotes: %d items.\n%s", valuesArr.size, getLogMessage("bulkInsert", null)))
 700→
 701→        var result = 0
 702→        for (i in valuesArr.indices) {
 703→            val values: ContentValues = valuesArr[i]
 704→            val flds = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.FLDS) ?: continue
 705→//                val allowEmpty = AllowEmpty.fromBoolean(values.getAsBoolean(FlashCardsContract.Note.ALLOW_EMPTY))
 706→            val thisModelId = values.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.Note.MID)
 707→            if (thisModelId == null || thisModelId < 0) {
 708→                Timber.d("Unable to get model at index: %d", i)
 709→                continue
 710→            }
 711→            val fldsArray = Utils.splitFields(flds)
 712→            // Create empty note
 713→            val newNote = col.run { Note.fromNotetypeId(thisModelId) }
 714→            // Set fields
 715→            // Check that correct number of flds specified
 716→            if (fldsArray.size != newNote.fields.size) {
 717→                throw IllegalArgumentException("Incorrect flds argument : $flds")
 718→            }
 719→            for (idx in fldsArray.indices) {
 720→                newNote.setField(idx, fldsArray[idx])
 721→            }
 722→            // Set tags
 723→            val tags = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.TAGS)
 724→            if (tags != null) {
 725→                newNote.setTagsFromStr(col, tags)
 726→            }
 727→            // Add to collection
 728→            col.addNote(newNote, deckId)
 729→            for (card: Card in newNote.cards(col)) {
 730→                card.did = deckId
 731→                col.updateCard(card)
 732→            }
 733→            result++
 734→        }
 735→
 736→        return result
 737→    }
