 739→    override fun insert(uri: Uri, values: ContentValues?): Uri? {
 740→        if (!hasReadWritePermission() && shouldEnforceQueryOrInsertSecurity()) {
 741→            throwSecurityException("insert", uri)
 742→        }
 743→        val col = CollectionHelper.instance.getColUnsafe(context!!)
 744→            ?: throw IllegalStateException(COL_NULL_ERROR_MSG)
 745→        col.log(getLogMessage("insert", uri))
 746→
 747→        // Find out what data the user is requesting
 748→        return when (sUriMatcher.match(uri)) {
 749→            NOTES -> {
 750→                /* Insert new note with specified fields and tags
 751→                 */
 752→                val modelId = values!!.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.Note.MID)
 753→                val flds = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.FLDS)
 754→                val tags = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Note.TAGS)
 755→//                val allowEmpty = AllowEmpty.fromBoolean(values.getAsBoolean(FlashCardsContract.Note.ALLOW_EMPTY))
 756→                // Create empty note
 757→                val newNote = col.run { Note.fromNotetypeId(modelId) }
 758→                // Set fields
 759→                val fldsArray = Utils.splitFields(flds)
 760→                // Check that correct number of flds specified
 761→                if (fldsArray.size != newNote.fields.size) {
 762→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Incorrect flds argument : $flds")
 763→                }
 764→                var idx = 0
 765→                while (idx < fldsArray.size) {
 766→                    newNote.setField(idx, fldsArray[idx])
 767→                    idx++
 768→                }
 769→                // Set tags
 770→                if (tags != null) {
 771→                    newNote.setTagsFromStr(col, tags)
 772→                }
 773→                // Add to collection
 774→                col.addNote(newNote)
 775→
 776→                Uri.withAppendedPath(FlashCardsContract.Note.CONTENT_URI, newNote.id.toString())
 777→            }
 778→            NOTES_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert note with specific ID")
 779→            NOTES_ID_CARDS, NOTES_ID_CARDS_ORD -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert cards directly (only through NOTES)")
 780→            MODELS -> {
 781→                // Get input arguments
 782→                val modelName = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.NAME)
 783→                val css = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.CSS)
 784→                val did = values.getAsLong(FlashCardsContract.Model.DECK_ID)
 785→                val fieldNames = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAMES)
 786→                val numCards = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.NUM_CARDS)
 787→                val sortf = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.SORT_FIELD_INDEX)
 788→                val type = values.getAsInteger(FlashCardsContract.Model.TYPE)
 789→                val latexPost = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_POST)
 790→                val latexPre = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.LATEX_PRE)
 791→                // Throw exception if required fields empty
 792→                if (modelName == null || fieldNames == null || numCards == null) {
 793→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Model name, field_names, and num_cards can't be empty")
 794→                }
 795→                if (did != null && col.decks.isFiltered(did)) {
 796→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Cannot set a filtered deck as default deck for a model")
 797→                }
 798→                // Create a new model
 799→                val mm = col.notetypes
 800→                val newModel = mm.new(modelName)
 801→                return try {
 802→                    // Add the fields
 803→                    val allFields = Utils.splitFields(fieldNames)
 804→                    for (f: String? in allFields) {
 805→                        mm.addFieldInNewModel(newModel, mm.newField(f!!))
 806→                    }
 807→                    // Add some empty card templates
 808→                    var idx = 0
 809→                    while (idx < numCards) {
 810→                        val cardName = CollectionManager.TR.cardTemplatesCard(idx + 1)
 811→                        val t = Notetypes.newTemplate(cardName)
 812→                        t.put("qfmt", "{{${allFields[0]}}}")
 813→                        var answerField: String? = allFields[0]
 814→                        if (allFields.size > 1) {
 815→                            answerField = allFields[1]
 816→                        }
 817→                        t.put("afmt", "{{FrontSide}}\\n\\n<hr id=answer>\\n\\n{{$answerField}}")
 818→                        mm.addTemplateInNewModel(newModel, t)
 819→                        idx++
 820→                    }
 821→                    // Add the CSS if specified
 822→                    if (css != null) {
 823→                        newModel.put("css", css)
 824→                    }
 825→                    // Add the did if specified
 826→                    if (did != null) {
 827→                        newModel.put("did", did)
 828→                    }
 829→                    if (sortf != null && sortf < allFields.size) {
 830→                        newModel.put("sortf", sortf)
 831→                    }
 832→                    if (type != null) {
 833→                        newModel.put("type", type)
 834→                    }
 835→                    if (latexPost != null) {
 836→                        newModel.put("latexPost", latexPost)
 837→                    }
 838→                    if (latexPre != null) {
 839→                        newModel.put("latexPre", latexPre)
 840→                    }
 841→                    // Add the model to collection (from this point on edits will require a full-sync)
 842→                    mm.add(newModel)
 843→
 844→                    // Get the mid and return a URI
 845→                    val mid = newModel.getLong("id").toString()
 846→                    Uri.withAppendedPath(FlashCardsContract.Model.CONTENT_URI, mid)
 847→                } catch (e: JSONException) {
 848→                    Timber.e(e, "Could not set a field of new model %s", modelName)
 849→                    null
 850→                }
 851→            }
 852→            MODELS_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert model with specific ID")
 853→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES -> {
 854→                run {
 855→                    val notetypes: Notetypes = col.notetypes
 856→                    val mid: NoteTypeId = getModelIdFromUri(uri, col)
 857→                    val existingModel: NotetypeJson = notetypes.get(mid)
 858→                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("model missing: $mid")
 859→                    val name: String = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.NAME)
 860→                    val qfmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.QUESTION_FORMAT)
 861→                    val afmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.ANSWER_FORMAT)
 862→                    val bqfmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_QUESTION_FORMAT)
 863→                    val bafmt: String = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.CardTemplate.BROWSER_ANSWER_FORMAT)
 864→                    try {
 865→                        var t: JSONObject = Notetypes.newTemplate(name)
 866→                        t.put("qfmt", qfmt)
 867→                        t.put("afmt", afmt)
 868→                        t.put("bqfmt", bqfmt)
 869→                        t.put("bafmt", bafmt)
 870→                        notetypes.addTemplate(existingModel, t)
 871→                        notetypes.update(existingModel)
 872→                        t = existingModel.tmpls.get(existingModel.tmpls.length() - 1) as JSONObject
 873→                        return ContentUris.withAppendedId(uri, t.getInt("ord").toLong())
 874→                    } catch (e: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
 875→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to add template without user requesting/accepting full-sync", e)
 876→                    } catch (e: JSONException) {
 877→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to get ord from new template", e)
 878→                    }
 879→                }
 880→            }
 881→            MODELS_ID_TEMPLATES_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert template with specific ORD")
 882→            MODELS_ID_FIELDS -> {
 883→                run {
 884→                    val notetypes: Notetypes = col.notetypes
 885→                    val mid: NoteTypeId = getModelIdFromUri(uri, col)
 886→                    val existingModel: NotetypeJson = notetypes.get(mid)
 887→                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("model missing: $mid")
 888→                    val name: String = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Model.FIELD_NAME)
 889→                        ?: throw IllegalArgumentException("field name missing for model: $mid")
 890→                    val field: JSONObject = notetypes.newField(name)
 891→                    try {
 892→                        notetypes.addField(existingModel, field)
 893→
 894→                        val flds: JSONArray = existingModel.getJSONArray("flds")
 895→                        return ContentUris.withAppendedId(uri, (flds.length() - 1).toLong())
 896→                    } catch (e: ConfirmModSchemaException) {
 897→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to insert field: $name", e)
 898→                    } catch (e: JSONException) {
 899→                        throw IllegalArgumentException("Unable to get newly created field: $name", e)
 900→                    }
 901→                }
 902→            }
 903→            SCHEDULE -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to perform insert operation on schedule")
 904→            DECKS -> {
 905→                // Insert new deck with specified name
 906→                val deckName = values!!.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Deck.DECK_NAME)
 907→                var did = col.decks.idForName(deckName)
 908→                if (did != null) {
 909→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Deck name already exists: $deckName")
 910→                }
 911→                if (!Decks.isValidDeckName(deckName)) {
 912→                    throw IllegalArgumentException("Invalid deck name '$deckName'")
 913→                }
 914→                try {
 915→                    did = col.decks.id(deckName)
 916→                } catch (filteredSubdeck: BackendDeckIsFilteredException) {
 917→                    throw IllegalArgumentException(filteredSubdeck.message)
 918→                }
 919→                val deck: Deck = col.decks.get(did)!!
 920→                @KotlinCleanup("remove the null check if deck is found to be not null in DeckManager.get(Long)")
 921→                @Suppress("SENSELESS_COMPARISON")
 922→                if (deck != null) {
 923→                    try {
 924→                        val deckDesc = values.getAsString(FlashCardsContract.Deck.DECK_DESC)
 925→                        if (deckDesc != null) {
 926→                            deck.put("desc", deckDesc)
 927→                        }
 928→                    } catch (e: JSONException) {
 929→                        Timber.e(e, "Could not set a field of new deck %s", deckName)
 930→                        return null
 931→                    }
 932→                }
 933→                Uri.withAppendedPath(FlashCardsContract.Deck.CONTENT_ALL_URI, did.toString())
 934→            }
 935→            DECK_SELECTED -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Selected deck can only be queried and updated")
 936→            DECKS_ID -> throw IllegalArgumentException("Not possible to insert deck with specific ID")
 937→            MEDIA ->
 938→                // insert a media file
 939→                // contentvalue should have data and preferredFileName values
 940→                insertMediaFile(values, col)
 941→            else -> throw IllegalArgumentException("uri $uri is not supported")
 942→        }
 943→    }

 945→    private fun insertMediaFile(values: ContentValues?, col: Collection): Uri? {
